summary_en: 227,000 shares (5.2% of outstanding) to be acquired at ¥905/share (closing price 2026-05-14) for up to ¥205.4M via ToSTNeT-3 block trade on 2026-05-15 at 08:45 JST. Execution limit order only.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares and repurchase via treasury share off-auction trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On 14 May 2026, the board of Takamisawa Cybernetics resolved to acquire treasury shares via off-auction block trading (ToSTNeT-3) on 15 May 2026. The company will submit a buy order at 08:45 JST at the closing price of ¥905/share recorded on 14 May (including final special quotation). The acquisition is capped at 227,000 shares (5.2% of outstanding, excluding treasury stock) with a maximum outlay of ¥205.435M. The execution is limited to a single trading slot; partial or no execution is possible depending on market conditions. Results will be published immediately after the 08:45 trading window closes. The repurchase is intended to improve capital efficiency and enable flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions.
